one_time_description: Loss on write-down of tangible capital assets
economic_notes: First Nation has investments in energy resources, oilfield services, midstream, travel centre, ranching, construction, gravel, and housing corporations. Oil royalties and resource revenues administered by Government of Canada under Indian Oil and Gas Act. CMHC replacement reserve violation noted.
notes: Fiscal year is 2022 (year ended March 31, 2022). Prior year (2021) audit was qualified by another auditor due to limitation of scope on GBE investments; current year audit is unqualified. Nation has 16 entities accounted for by modified equity method including energy, oilfield services, midstream, travel, ranching, construction entities. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($36,304,152) + ISC Health ($6,633,833) + ISETS ($991,376) + FNDF ($705,183) + CMHC ($560,135) = $45,194,679; however FNDF may be considered non-government; OSR adjusted accordingly. Investment income includes negative prior year figure (-$4,186,144) suggesting market losses in 2021. CMHC replacement reserve violation noted. No schedule of remuneration included in provided text.
